answer:
There are two distinct projects referred to as a Copper MCP server.

The viaSocket Copper MCP server allows you to connect Copper CRM actions to AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor. It provides a managed, secure endpoint that handles authentication and API integration, allowing you to trigger Copper tasks directly from your AI assistant [1].

The copper-mountain-vna-mcp server is a specialized tool for controlling Copper Mountain Vector Network Analyzers [2]. It communicates via TCP/IP SCPI to expose 45 tools for tasks such as sweep configuration, calibration, marker math, and S-parameter measurement to MCP-compatible AI clients [2].

results.title: Build an MCP server - Model Context Protocol
